name: Bill Sapp Recreation Center
description: Bill Sapp Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lumberton, NC. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
open_play_schedule: No courts at this time. Lines removed to refinish floor of gym.

name: Meadow Road Athletic Park
description:
Courts are locked. For access call Byrd at (919) 360-1620. 
To connect with the local group join TeamReach. The group code is 28358MR

name: W.E.R Joell Tennis Stadium
description: W.E.R Joell Tennis Stadium is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pembroke, NC. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.
